- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	- Flutter timetable app with SQLite, Provider, screenshot, export features
	- Complete feature set defined

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	- Flutter project structure created
	- pubspec.yaml with all dependencies
	- All necessary directories created

- [x] Customize the Project
	- Models created (Timetable, Subject, Standard, TimeSlot, TimetableRow)
	- Database service with SQLite implementation
	- Provider state management for all data
	- All screens implemented (Home, History, Settings, Standards, Subjects, TimeSlots, Editor, Preview)
	- Export functionality (PNG, JPG, Share)
	- Date/time utilities

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	- No extensions needed for Flutter development in VS Code

- [x] Compile the Project
	- Run: flutter pub get ✓ (Completed)
	- flutter analyze: No issues found! ✓

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	- Use flutter run command

- [ ] Launch the Project
	- Run flutter run to launch the app

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	- README.md created with comprehensive documentation
	- copilot-instructions.md updated with progress
